spikePanel.priceDrivenChange: Price-driven change — transaction details coming soon
spikePanel.noSignificantTransactions: No significant transactions for this date.

spikeSettings.showMarkersTooltip: Toggle colored markers on the chart that highlight significant balance changes.
spikeSettings.percentThresholdTooltip: Minimum percentage change in balance between two consecutive days to mark as a spike. Either this or the absolute threshold must be exceeded. Low values show more markers.
spikeSettings.absoluteThresholdTooltip: Minimum absolute balance change (in your base currency) to qualify as a spike. Either this or the % threshold must be exceeded.
spikeSettings.maxMarkersTooltip: Maximum number of spike markers shown on the chart. When there are more spikes than this limit, only the most significant ones are displayed.

validation.outOfRange: Value is out of allowed range

excludedCategories.message: Some categories are excluded from this widget

excludeSettings.title: Settings
excludeSettings.dialogDescription: Select categories to exclude from this widget's chart and totals

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow
cashFlow.description: Shows your net savings: income minus expenses for the selected period, with a trend of previous periods

creditUtilization.title: Credit Utilization
creditUtilization.description: Shows how much of your credit limits are currently used across all accounts

widgets.emptyState: There are no data in selected time interval.
